вљ пёЏ EXECUTION CONTRACT (ABSOLUTE вЂ” NO EXCEPTIONS)

YOU MUST:

- ZERO summarisation

- ZERO inferred logic
- ZERO architectural redesign
- ZERO regression
- ZERO placeholder / fake / mock data
- ZERO skipping steps

IF ANY REQUIREMENT IS UNCLEAR:
в†’ OUTPUT EXACTLY:
BLOCKED: REQUIREMENT UNCLEAR

DO NOT CONTINUE.

рџЋЇ OBJECTIVE
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

1. IMMEDIATE WOW MOMENT (4 forensic cards)
2. DEEP CMO STATUS QUO (executive narrative)
3. 7 / 30 / 90 DAY STRATEGIC PLAN
4. FULL REPORT SYSTEM (persisted, monetisable)
5. CONVERSION HOOK (drive integrations + upgrades)
6. VERIFIED BUSINESS IDENTITY (ABN enforced)
7. VERIFIED SOCIAL PRESENCE (multi-source extraction)

DO NOT MODIFY:
- calibration-business-dna
- enrichment pipeline
- identity verification
- executive snapshot engine
- backend intelligence logic

ONLY MODIFY:
- frontend orchestration
- report generation layer
- transformation logic
- identity enrichment layer (ABN + social)

рџ§ѕ NEW LAYER вЂ” ABN GUD VALIDATION (MANDATORY вЂ” NON-OPTIONAL)
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

YOU MUST IMPLEMENT A HARD VALIDATION STEP.

POSITION IN FLOW:
AFTER WEBSITE SCAN
BEFORE identity_verification

-----------------------------------------------------

ABN VALIDATION LOGIC (STRICT):

STEP 1:
Check for ABN in:
- extracted_data.abn
- identity_signals.abn_candidates

IF FOUND:
в†’ CALL ABN GUD API TO VALIDATE

STEP 2:
IF NOT FOUND:
в†’ CALL ABN GUD API USING:

- business_name
- location
- domain

-----------------------------------------------------

RESPONSE HANDLING:

IF EXACT MATCH:
в†’ AUTO POPULATE:
- legal_name
- ABN
- registered_address
- entity_status

IF MULTIPLE MATCHES:
в†’ PASS STRUCTURED OPTIONS TO UI

IF NO MATCH:
в†’ SET:
abn_status = "not_found"

-----------------------------------------------------

MANDATORY OUTPUT STRUCTURE:

ADD TO identitySignals:

{
  abn_verified: true|false,
  abn_source: "website|gud_api",
  legal_name: "",
  entity_status: "",
  registered_address: "",
  abn_status: "verified|multiple|not_found"
}

-----------------------------------------------------

рџљ« FAILURE CONDITIONS:

- ABN exists but NOT validated в†’ FAIL
- ABN guessed в†’ FAIL
- ABN skipped в†’ FAIL

CURRENT ISSUE:
HTML-only extraction is insufficient.

YOU MUST IMPLEMENT MULTI-SOURCE EXTRACTION:

-----------------------------------------------------

EXECUTION ORDER (STRICT):

1. PERPLEXITY (PRIMARY)
QUERY:
"What are the official social media profiles for [business name] [domain]"

2. HTML EXTRACTION (SECONDARY)

3. SEARCH RESULT PARSING (TERTIARY)

-----------------------------------------------------

PLATFORMS REQUIRED:

- LinkedIn
- Facebook
- Instagram
- X / Twitter
- YouTube

-----------------------------------------------------

OUTPUT STRUCTURE:

{
  linkedin: "",
  facebook: "",
  instagram: "",
  twitter: "",
  youtube: "",
  source: "perplexity|html|search",
  social_status: "verified|partial|not_detected"
}

-----------------------------------------------------

MERGING RULES:

- Perplexity overrides ALL
- HTML fills gaps only
- NEVER duplicate
- NEVER fabricate

-----------------------------------------------------

FAIL CONDITION:

IF NO SOCIAL FOUND:
в†’ RETURN:
social_status = "not_detected"

DO NOT GUESS.
